subject: The Hyperion Trust
body:
Jorie just called to tell me that the Trust Declaration appears to be  fine.  
She told me that she would Notarize your signature for today's date,  if we 
got the signed document to her.  Just give it to Daphne when you can  and I 
will have Daphne send it to Jorie for notarization.  Thanks.  In  case you could 
not pull it off the last -email, I am attaching again The  Hyperion Trust 
Declaration for your signature 
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com) 

------------------------------

in  this email. Each taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's

subject: The Hyperion Trust
body:
Please review and sign the attached Trust Document.  I have sent it to  Jorie 
for review, but assuming that it is acceptable, I would like to set it up  
today.
